ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located (e.g., Northeast, South, Midwest, West) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the city's population */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the index belongs to */,
  "cost_of_living_index" REAL /* Cost of living index for the city */,
  "rent_index" REAL /* Rent index for the city */,
  "cost_of_living_plus_rent_index" REAL /* Combined cost of living and rent index for the city */,
  "groceries_index" REAL /* Groceries index for the city */,
  "restaurant_price_index" REAL /* Restaurant price index for the city */,
  "local_purchasing_power_index" REAL /* Local purchasing power index for the city */,
  "healthcare_index" REAL /* Healthcare index for the city */,
  "transportation_index" REAL /* Transportation index for the city */,
  "utilities_index" REAL /* Utilities index for the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the index was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the ranking belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the city based on the specified index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index used for ranking (e.g., cost of living, rent, etc.) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the ranking was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_index_data_sources" (
  "city_index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city index */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the city index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_index_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_data, edit_data, delete_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
